title: Transferable Topic Modeling Enables Cross-Atlas Mining and Reveals Developmental Cellular Lineage Persistence in Cancer
author: Rajendran, Ashmitha
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains the pipeline used for topic modeling analysis of single-cell RNA sequencing data from human cerebellar development (Cao et al., Aldinger et al.) and its application to pediatric brain tumors (Arora et al.).
steps_raw: This repository contains the pipeline used for topic modeling analysis of single-cell RNA sequencing data from human cerebellar development (Cao et al., Aldinger et al.) and its application to pediatric brain tumors (Arora et al.).
